    "Separate neutral and equipment grounding bars are correctly isolated",
    "The main bonding jumper (green bonding screw) is correctly omitted and stored",
    "Breaker terminals are limited to a single conductor each",

  "rationale": "The subpanel installation is fully compliant with residential electrical codes. The neutral and ground systems are properly isolated by omitting the green bonding screw, which is required for a subpanel to prevent objectionable neutral current on the grounding system. All other workmanship standards, including terminal terminations, knockout seals, and clearances, are met.",
